name: Animated Glow
desc: Multi-layer animated glow with presets (Rainbow, Ocean Sunset). Web recreation of react-native-animated-glow which uses Skia under the hood.

name: Siri Orb
desc: Animated Siri-style audio visualizer orb with reactive wave animations and glowing effects. Built with CSS conic-gradients and blend modes.

name: Glow Particles
desc: Floating, pulsing particles with glow halos rendered via PixiJS WebGL. High-performance 2D particle system with smooth animations.

name: Layout Animation
desc: Smooth layout animations powered by Motion (Framer). Cards expand, collapse, and reflow with spring-based transitions using layoutId and the layout prop.

name: Spring Physics Animation
desc: Physics-based spring animations that feel natural and alive. Stagger cards, bounce elements, and create fluid transitions powered by real spring dynamics.

name: Auto Animate
desc: Zero-config automatic animations for adding, removing, and reordering list items. Drop-in smooth transitions with a single hook -- no keyframes or spring configs needed.

name: Scroll Parallax
desc: Multi-layer parallax scrolling effect where elements move at different speeds as you scroll, creating an immersive depth illusion. Powered by react-scroll-parallax.

name: Text Typewriter
desc: Typewriter animation that cycles through phrases with a blinking cursor. Powered by react-type-animation.

name: 3D Card Tilt
desc: Interactive 3D tilt effect with glare on hover. Powered by react-parallax-tilt.

name: Infinite Marquee
desc: Smoothly scrolling infinite marquee with pause-on-hover and gradient edges. Powered by react-fast-marquee.

name: Hand-drawn Annotation
desc: Animate hand-drawn style annotations on text — underlines, circles, highlights, and brackets that feel sketchy and personal.

name: Animated Number
desc: Smoothly animated number transitions that morph digits in place. Perfect for dashboards, counters, and stats that update in real time.

name: Animated Counter
desc: Smooth count-up animations that bring numbers to life. Perfect for dashboards, statistics sections, and landing pages that showcase impressive metrics.

name: Confetti Rain
desc: Colorful confetti particles rain down to celebrate actions and milestones. Contained within any element, not just full-screen.

name: Awesome Reveal
desc: React components to add reveal animations using the Intersection Observer API and CSS Animations.

name: Rewards
desc: This package lets you easily add micro-interactions to your app and reward users with the rain of confetti, emoji or balloons.

name: Embla Carousel React
desc: A lightweight carousel library with fluid motion and great swipe precision

name: Loading Skeleton
desc: Make beautiful, animated loading skeletons that automatically adapt to your app.

name: Spinners
desc: A collection of beautiful react loading spinners with smooth animations.

name: Lottie Animations
desc: Render After Effects animations natively in React using the Lottie format for lightweight, scalable vector animations.

name: Haiku
desc: React Hook & Utility Library — custom cursor follower with glowing trail that tracks mouse position with smooth delay.

name: Transition State
desc: Zero dependency React transition state machine. Toggle elements with enter/exit animations using a simple hook-based API.

name: Scroll Motion
desc: Easy scroll-driven animations with React. Elements fade, slide, zoom, and stick as you scroll through pages.

name: Lenis
desc: How smooth scroll should be. Adds inertia-based smooth scrolling with natural momentum and buttery 60fps performance.

name: Use Ripple Hook
desc: Customizable, lightweight React hook for implementing Google's Material UI style ripple effect

name: Light Beam
desc: A customizable React component that creates a light beam effect using conic gradients. Supports dark mode and various customization options.

name: Content Loader
desc: SVG-Powered component to easily create placeholder loadings (like Facebook cards loading)

name: Hamburger React
desc: Animated hamburger menu icons for React

name: Blob
desc: React component that looks like liquid in space

name: Simplex Noise
desc: simplex-noise is a fast simplex noise implementation in Javascript. Works in node and in the browser.

name: Animate Height
desc: Lightweight React component for animating height using CSS transitions. Perfect for accordions, expandable panels, and collapsible content.

name: Drei 3D Effects
desc: Useful helpers and abstractions for react-three-fiber: Stars, Float, MeshDistortMaterial, and more.

name: Postprocessing
desc: postprocessing wrapper for React and @react-three/fiber

name: 3D Shader Gradient
desc: Stunning 3D mesh gradients powered by WebGL shaders. Create animated, interactive gradient backgrounds with water, plane, and sphere styles reminiscent of Apple's design language.
